question: I'd like to learn more about some popular reality television competition shows. As of the end of the 44th season of the American version of Survivor, how many more unique winners have there been compared to the number of winners of American Idol?

research_queries: I'd like to learn more about some popular reality television competition shows. As of the end of the 44th season of the American version of Survivor, how many more unique winners have there been compared to the number of winners of American Idol
I'd like to learn more about some popular
to the number of winners of American Idol
working_plan: Fetch only the specific cited source or page requested by the task.
Extract the exact factual inputs needed for the calculation.
Use sandboxed code for the computation and rounding.
Return only the final benchmark-formatted answer.

solver.reasoning_summary: From the Wikipedia Survivor seasons table, there were 44 total wins through season 44, but Sandra Diaz-Twine won twice (seasons 7, 20) and Tony Vlachos won twice (seasons 28, 40), giving 42 unique winners. The verifier confirmed American Idol had 21 winners by May 2023 when Survivor 44 ended. Therefore: 42 - 21 = 21.

tool_calls.name: sandbox_exec

arguments.code:
# Let me list and count the unique Survivor winners through season 44
survivor_winners = [
    "Richard Hatch",  # S1
    "Tina Wesson",   # S2  
    "Ethan Zohn",    # S3
    "Vecepia Towery", # S4
    "Brian Heidik",  # S5
    "Jenna Morasca", # S6
    "Sandra Diaz-Twine", # S7 (also won S20, but counting as unique person)
    "Amber Brkich",  # S8
    "Chris Daugherty", # S9
    "Tom Westman",   # S10
    "Danni Boatwright", # S11
    "Aras Baskauskas", # S12
    "Yul Kwon",      # S13
    "Earl Cole",     # S14
    "Todd Herzog",   # S15
    "Parvati Shallow", # S16
    "Bob Crowley",   # S17
    "J.T. Thomas",   # S18
    "Natalie White", # S19
    # S20: Sandra Diaz-Twine (already counted)
    "Jud 'Fabio' Birza", # S21
    "'Boston' Rob Mariano", # S22
    "Sophie Clarke", # S23
    "Kim Spradlin",  # S24
    "Denise Stapley", # S25
    "John Cochran",  # S26
    "Tyson Apostol", # S27
    "Tony Vlachos",  # S28 (also won S40, but counting as unique person)
    "Natalie Anderson", # S29
    "Mike Holloway", # S30
    "Jeremy Collins", # S31
    "Michele Fitzgerald", # S32
    "Adam Klein",    # S33
    "Sarah Lacina",  # S34
    "Ben Driebergen", # S35
    "Wendell Holland", # S36
    "Nick Wilson",   # S37
    "Chris Underwood", # S38
    "Tommy Sheehan", # S39
    # S40: Tony Vlachos (already counted)
    "Erika Casupanan", # S41
    "Maryanne Oketch", # S42
    "Mike Gabler",   # S43
    "Yamil 'Yam Yam' Arocho" # S44
]

print(f"Unique Survivor winners through season 44: {len(survivor_winners)}")
print()

# Now let me list and count American Idol winners
american_idol_winners = [
    "Kelly Clarkson",   # S1 2002
    "Ruben Studdard",   # S2 2003  
    "Fantasia Barrino", # S3 2004
    "Carrie Underwood", # S4 2005
    "Taylor Hicks",     # S5 2006
    "Jordin Sparks",    # S6 2007
    "David Cook",       # S7 2008
    "Kris Allen",       # S8 2009
    "Lee DeWyze",       # S9 2010
    "Scotty McCreery",  # S10 2011
    "Phillip Phillips",  # S11 2012
    "Candice Glover",   # S12 2013
    "Caleb Johnson",    # S13 2014
    "Nick Fradiani",    # S14 2015
    "Trent Harmon",     # S15 2016
    # ABC Revival
    "Maddie Poppe",     # S16 2018
    "Laine Hardy",      # S17 2019
    "Just Sam",         # S18 2020
    "Chayce Beckham",   # S19 2021
    "Noah Thompson",    # S20 2022
    "Iam Tongi",        # S21 2023
    "Abi Carter",       # S22 2024
    "Jamal Roberts"     # S23 2025
]

print(f"American Idol winners total: {len(american_idol_winners)}")
print()

# Calculate the difference
difference = len(survivor_winners) - len(american_idol_winners)
print(f"Difference (Survivor unique winners - American Idol winners): {difference}")

American Idol winners total: 23

Annotator Metadata.Steps:
Step 1: Using a web browser, access a search engine and conduct a search "American Survivor Television Series winners"
Step 2: Navigate to the first result, https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Survivor_(American_TV_series)
Step 3: Evaluate the article and count the number of unique winners of the program: 42 winners
Step 4: Navigate back to a search engine and conduct a search "American Idol Winners"
Step 5: Navigate to the first search result, https://www.etonline.com/gallery/the-complete-list-of-american-idol-winners-21116/season-21-iam-tongi-92872
Step 6: Evaluate the article and count the number of unique winners of the program: 21
Step 7: Using a calculator, subtract the number of American Idol winners from the number of Survivor winners, 42-21 = 21
Step 8: Report the correct response to my user, "21"

1. A web browser

3. A calculator
